title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Walker Chandiok

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Walker Chandiok
jsonLd.description:
Walker Chandiok is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Walker Chandiok:
Walker Chandiok is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok!
